title: Sniffer period
description: The mod adds the old days when the great lizards of the “sniffing period” still dominated the earth. While Sniffers were in a very large population on the planet
body:
![ Fashion logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e275e9f443ab485f3220f9c6dd397131615629.png)
**Sniffer period** - is a mod that adds prehistoric creatures to their special world

**For the mod to work, you need to install the additional Geckolib mod version NeoForge 1.21.1 - 4.7.3:** [https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

 **At the moment the following is available:**
 
- Unique vegetation
- Ancient mobs
- New food
- New dimension and unique new biomes
- New items and weapons
